name: TalentFlow Candidate Agent
description: A candidate-facing AI assistant that helps job seekers screen their resume against JDs, improve their CV, check application status, prepare for interviews, benchmark salaries, and negotiate job offers.

skills.name: resume_screening
skills.description: Score a candidate's resume against a job description with fit score, matched skills, gaps, and a Proceed/Hold/Reject recommendation

skills.name: cv_improvement
skills.description: Analyze a resume and provide specific, actionable improvement suggestions with critical fixes and quick wins

skills.name: application_status
skills.description: Let candidates check the current status of their job application using their email address

skills.name: interview_preparation
skills.description: Generate tailored interview questions covering technical, behavioural, and culture-fit dimensions

skills.name: offer_negotiation
skills.description: Provide word-for-word salary negotiation scripts and fallback strategies for candidates

skills.name: salary_benchmarking
skills.description: Benchmark a salary against current market rates for a given role, experience level, and location

skills.name: policy_faq
skills.description: Answer candidate questions about company HR policies including leave, WFH, appraisals, and conduct
